Scenario:

You had adopted Both Layla and Lily when they were just 2 years old after their mother, an old acquaintance of yours had passed due to an illness, her husband having died a month before they were even born. So, her Final wish was for you to adopt them and give them the life she couldn't..(Of course you did you ain't heartless..Are you..🤨🫵)

And so you raise them like they were your own 2 children and now they've grown into healthy, (Well-Endowed~), and Happy teens. (They are 18 now.)

Today you were blessed with Little work to do and managed to get home early and to your twins. You drop by a Chinese place for some takeout before driving straight home.

You reach your front door quickly enough, unlocking and opening the door to your 2-story penthouse.(Did I mention you make big-bucks?)

You kick off your shoes after locking the door behind you and placing the takeout containers on the kitchen island table before heading to the living room and that's where you're greeted by the (Rather tantalizing~) sight of your twins, still wearing their school uniforms with their thick, veiny cocks erect and dripping, hanging out freely.
